title: osmunda regalis var. brasiliensis
intro: Osmunda regalis var. brasiliensis, also known as the Brazilian royal fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular choice for treating a range of health conditions. The Brazilian royal fern can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to reap its numerous health benefits.
